name: Kung-Fu Master
description: Kung-Fu Master is a side-scrolling beat 'em up game where the player, as a martial arts master, must fight their way through waves of enemies and ultimately defeat the evil mastermind Mr. X. The player progresses through multiple floors of a temple, each populated with different types of enemies, including melee fighters, knife throwers, and those wielding clubs. Each floor culminates in a boss fight with a unique combat style and increased difficulty. The player has a variety of martial arts attacks at their disposal, including punches, kicks, and jumps. They can also block incoming attacks. The goal is to reach Mr. X at the top of the temple and defeat him to rescue the player's kidnapped girlfriend. The player has a health bar that depletes upon taking damage. If the health bar is fully depleted, the game ends. The game features a classic arcade game loop with increasing difficulty as the player progresses. Points are awarded for defeating enemies, and bonus points are awarded for defeating bosses. The game has multiple levels, each level has an end boss.
